star_1.text: I've played this game for two weeks. Here are my complaints: When you start out, the ads are constant and annoying; pretty much unbearable. I spent $3.99 to "remove ads." Well, guess what? You want to open a bonus chest? You still have to watch an ad. Skill upgrades occasionally still mandate watching an ad. This is AFTER paying to "remove ads." This seems dishonest to me. Then, once you upgrade all your skills to level 100, they are capped. You can't upgrade them anymore after that. Dumb game.

the sheer amount of ads is infuriating. ad after your first launch. wanna get an upgrade, gota watch an ad. got a chest? watch an ad to open it. ad after every other launch. some times you get an ad after you just got an ad. ig you gotta make money back. but fml. ad on ad on ad on ad on ad in ad. im not paying 3.99 just so i dont see ads every other second.
The obstacles in this game are SO annoying,plus the characters look stupid. DO NOT RECOMMEND!

Games like this deserve nothing more than 1 star. There's a lot of ads, which is understandable if you're not paying, but they force you to open the advertised game on the play store instead of skipping the add. The only way to proceed is to open the play store, absolutely ridiculous and should not even be allowed in the first place.

The only reason for this rating: In the game, to increase the level of one of the characteristics, you need to watch an advertisement... But if you don't have the Internet and the advertising video hasn't loaded, then you won't be able to improve this characteristic... As a result, due to the only solution - to block the upgrade through advertising - the meaning of the word "game" itself simply disappears (from my point of view)

This is the worst game I have played which is very sad because most of games I played games that have a lot of ads and I can skip it, but this game has way too much unskipable ads. Each time you stop, a 30 second to 1 minute unskipable ad pops up and it annoys you A LOT. They put unskipable ads to force people/kids to buy a stupid monthly membership without even having a few mins worth of gameplay. It's the worst game I've ever played now. I strongly recommend that you do not install this game because you'll get very mad of the ads in this game till you buy a membership or buy no ads. If not, you will have to stay with the pointless time wasting ads.
love this game. but the ads. what's going on with ALL GAMES. not only do you get an ad but they now send you to Google play store then you have to press x the back key then x again. what's going on.

leveling up makes no sense. I could hit 19k without touching the floor. spent around 200,000 coins on upgrades and im still barely gettkng 19k vefore hitting the floor. upgrades dont make any difference. edit. everything is maxed and no room fpr progression. awful game
This was a paid game in epic games store and still comes with ads! I did not like paying for ads and they compromised my gaming experience.
every time you play every round an ad pops up uuuuuuuuuhhhhhhhhhggggg I don't recommend it to anyone I just deleted it because it was so annoying
Absolutely obscene amount of ads, most of which are unsolicited and last for over a minute. what a shame as could be a good game. great way to burn your data though.
worst game ever, there are so many ads i cant even dk anything. When is try to go back to the start to hit agian its a ad and when i do get to the start theres just more adds

forced ads plus blocking upgrades behind watching ads to prevent you from being able to progress in the game. it's pretty pathetic. ultimately had about 2 minutes of ads for every 3 minute of gameplay. cannot recommend. a 4.5 with so many negative reviews up front points to review botting or bribing. I don't care for your opinion on me not enjoying the game, developers. Don't bother me with your copy pasta.
paid for no ads. still getting ads... the game itself is great past this. have a receipt and getting a refund....
game bugged out midgame and even after restarting the all still was buggy
they want you to subscribe for $6.99 a week to go ad free, so of course there is an ad after every turn. Uninstalling after 2 minutes of play.

TOO MANY ADDS without enough content! The ads are a pattern with azur! Like my review for Tank Stars(another azur game) it's a good game with a cool concept, but has a MERSELES onslaught of ads. the content pretty much ends a few hours into playing the game, and needs a minigame or new levels or SOMETHING. Also, the "developer" responding to reviews is just a DUMB AI that somehow still hasn't figured out that I'm calling it out and keeps thanking me for my "support" despite me insulting the game

Ok it feels good in the hand, it looks good, it has something to get you addicted. BUT! AN AD AFTER EVERY ROUND? DOUBLE POINTS? AD TO COLLECT THE CHEST YOU GOT FROM GAMEPLAY!? From a marketing point of view this game is getting a lot more money from ad stuff than from paying players. For the good gameplay you got 1 star, but from the ads point of view this is the most garbage game i've ever played. If you are reading this, don't waste your time! :)
the game spent all its time Begging for money and i couldn't play it while listening to a podcast in the background.Not at all fun.

great game. even subscribed, but that's the problem. I maxed out my character and so I went to unsubscribe, and it won't let me. I've been at it for 3 days and still can't do it, it says subscription not found every time I go to cancel it. I'm gonna have to cancel my card and order a new one because idk what else to do.

star_2.text: Hope you like advertisements and laggy input. Because this game has them both. I tried playing this game and it had a fun concept and was more fast paced than Skywhale. I was interrupted mid game for prompts. I thought that would be the only time it happened, but there was major input lag and loss of fps when playing this game both online and offline. Playgendary has always caught my interest in their game ideas, but they're always terrible and filled with ads. That's probably the last game made by them that I'll ever play.

Decent game but ads nearly forced at all times, even when ad free is purchased. When I purchase a "Remove all ads" 3.99 purchase, and then immediately have to watch an ad to open a chest, we have a problem. The purchase specifically said remove all ads, not leave in ones for opening chests or free upgrades. To charge and still leave ads in is very shady, and I wish I could request a refund and uninstall as this was very poor wording for the purchase.

Excellent graphics and easy to get a hang of, this game will leave you bored and dissatisfied after a few weeks. It's revs you up to believe there will be a sequence of events, but all you get is a couple of too short scenes. Guess it's all you can expect from a free game. It really boils down to wash rinse and repeat. I can't bear to do it anymore. I got all the stats up and bought the best materials with nothing to show for it except heightened impact. Fun 4a couple quick pow wows; gets old.
forced ads. then also ads to get bonuses.

would rate so much higher if not for the oppressive ads. I would rather pay for the game than deal with them. there's an ad at the bottom of the screen for the ENTIRE game time. and then, after EVERY ROUND is an ad. it really breaks the flow of the game, and kills any desire to get into it. I used to play this game years ago, but now starting at the beginning with low level upgrades/gear I'm spending more time watching ads than playing the game. really unfortunate

This has the potential to be a genuinely good little game. the mechanics and the design are great, but wow the ads! every single go you need to watch an ad. they're skippabke, but even skipping an ad takes up to 30 seconds these days, when you have to wait for the second ad page to come up. in a time waster game you might play for 5 minutes, it is too much.

Adds are horrible it forces you to watch an ad after every single hit, even if it goes nowhere. 10 seconds of game play, then 30 to 120 seconds of ads over and over. The game itself isn't bad, though. I just can't enjoy it with that many ads. Make it so there's an ad after every 4 or 5 hits and the option to watch for double gold, and I'll play it

This game used to be playable without so many ads, but now every time you do anything, your get hit with a forced 30 second ad. I used to be able to play a few levels of this game during work breaks, only watching ads to achieve certain tasks. Now, I can only play 2 lousy turns because of the amount of ads now, and then I have to go back to work. I spend more time waiting for ads than actual game play. When ads overwhelm the game like that, it's not fun anymore. Sorry, but I'm uninstalling this.

Too Many Forced Ads! This is a game I played back in the early 2000s on a desktop, so I was so excited when I found it here! However, the biggest let down is that there are a TON of ads which ruins the game. Not to mention the ads that show up at the bottom of the screen while playing have messed the game up soo many times. Also when there is an option to watch or not watch an add for more coins, it forces you to watch the ad anyway.

Bugs, bugs and... app closed due to bugs. An ad after every "at bat" ensures that there's plenty of thumb-twiddling downtime while you are "playing". Yeah, this game has been designed for sponsors, not for players, because the gaming experience is low on the list of priorities. And if you're fortunate enough to get to the end of an ad, there's no guarantee that you'll be able to continue playing the game because the bugs will ensure that the game either freezes or crashes. At least that's been my experience. I should clarify that I have only played this game on Wi-Fi and that my Wi-Fi is not experiencing any issues. 100% frustration guaranteed.

i wish i could play this specific game more, seems fun, but I always get these interactive ads for other games that offer no way to close the ad, but the gameplay for the ads offer more gameplay than this game. i get 20sec of bouncemasters followed by a forever interactive ad that i play until bored.

as a base game its fun and I can see why it has the ratings it does but when I get enough ad pop ups in just 10 minutes of play time to be able to pay off my college debt then you should probably rethink your model for making money from the game. theres other ways to slow gameplay to make people wanna buy things that don't absolutely kill the game itself for free players

This game is not the best really. Ad after ad after ad and the adverts just won't stop. It's ok but for me it just gets repetitive quickly and it doesn't really have much going for it like just hit a penguin with a bat and see how far it goes and then claim your reward and what is the reward. 30 coins and an ad. Yeah that's TOTALLY what I wanted. No it's not what I want at all. Only give an ad like 5 levels because it's ad after every level. For now don't download until update or UPGRADE!

Good game, Its comical, lighthearted and addictive but the sheer volume of adverts that there are totally kills it. One every now and again I can deal with but I had one when I finished a round, one to open the chest and one before I started the next round. Thats just ridiculous.

Ads overload ... even when I select not to double my coins with a video, it goes to a video. I played for a shore time and couldn't get more than 3 hits without an ad popping up. If they would lessen the ads like most games, it would be tolerable, maybe even fun.

Great game for a few days once you buy the $5 add-free add-on. Get used to 30 second ads after every hit otherwise. Global list is broken after 100,000 feet, just spins forever. Level 100 is max for each of the four or five progression areas, afterword money is completely worthless. There's a lot of potential, just seems like the devs got really lazy.

This game is fun but the amount of bugs surrounding the ads is really annoying. The game will crash sometimes after an ad plays (the worst one was an ad for another game by this developer and it froze my phone for a solid minute). Its the worst when you get a case in a run but you can't open it because after watching two ads (one to collect your earnings and one to open the damn case) it freezes forcing you to close the app and forfeit your case. You guys owe me like 10 cases so far. Other than that it's a fun game, just wish I could play it.

WAY too many ads. Every 10 seconds when you're trying to play. I can't load the screen without having to sit through a 15 to 30 second ad about something. Even when I don't want to upgrade to more coins I still have to sit through a video. It completely destroys the fun of playing this game because they're so greedy that they have to have these popups constantly. I ended up uninstalling the game because honestly it's not good enough to have to sit through ads so often.

The mechanics and gameplay are actually pretty good in this game, but the ads are overwhelming. There are so many it crashes the game, on my mobile. In addition to an ad between every launch, you have to watch them to open the chests you earn, plus some ability upgrades require them. You wind up spending considerably more time watching ads than actually playing the game.

So much fun if you can get past all the ads. There is an an ad after every round. Each round will take about 30secs to a minute. Sometimes that ad leads into another ad. When offered to watch an ad to double your rewards, if you select 'No', you will be forced to watch an ad anyway, but without the reward. Improving is long and tedious without the double rewards though

star_3.text: Very fun! I've always had a soft spot for games like this because of neopets. As most people have said there are a few too many ads, i seem to get one every two games, even if I don't hit the extra money option, but they aren't long ads and are skippable. Although i like it there isn't enough content. I finished all of the content in less than an hour. Did play more hoqever so that I could get each thing to 100, but then realixed there was ltterally nothing to spend coins on after that which was disheartening. Altogether fun game, needs some more content, but all in all I enjoyed it.

This game would be so cool & it was at first, VERY addicting. But then as you upgrade & get "Amazing Hits" it takes way too long to get to the ground. +++ when you finally reach the Trophy area, when the penguin gets his girlfriend... The game is basically over.... You can still play & get your score on the leaderboard... But it's not that fun... I wish they added Challenge Levels or something, something to make it more interesting... It gets old really fast.

It's not a bad game but I am going to un install because it forces you to pay for a subscription and there isn't an exit button. So you would have to restart the app. It's not worth it. If any game app needs money so badly it's easier to just pay $2 to take ads away or even charge $1 for some characters. Paying $7 a week isn't even worth keeping a game.

The game is decent to be honest, but just like everything else this company has ever made, this game shoves ads down your throat to make money. There will be ads every single time you hit a penguin. I hear from people that ads pop-up during gameplay. The reason for these hoards of ads to make more money. For greed. Otherwise the gameplay is average, all you need to do is to hit the penquin. Also V.I.P Access needs to go! Nobody is going to pay 6.99 just to hit a damn penquin!

No point in playing after you reach lvl 100 inthe game. You can't do anything new after you get the girlfriend. Devs need to add more content, or it's boring after you man out your skills at 100. I now have over a billion gold and nothing to buy. Ads ruin it. After every seeing it's an ad. Skip an ad and you still get an ad. Unless you want to pay over 30 a MONTH to remove them. Very dissatisfied. If be happy paying a one time fee of up to 10 bucks to remove the ad, but this is unreasonable.

This game is pretty good and lot of fun. I love the personality in the characters but there are ton of bugs ranging from if hit a bouncing object from an amazing launch and happen to dive on it. It locks you into an infinite flight that you cant escape from so you lose all your progress anyways. There is also a ton of problems with game crashing and screen not functioning right after as pop up.

The game is kinda fun except for the fact that the first 10 minutes when you start playing the game its 7 minutes of watching ads then 3 minutes of gameplay. It would be fine if you get to choose when to watch the ads but they force you to watch them when you want to buy upgrades. I know you have to earn money some way or another but at least make it so you can choose when to watch instead of forcing it.

I really like the game and how it performs. But I wish had added the thing where you draw the bat in the adds but over all its really good oh and can u pls do a thing ware u can add friends and race them, add difrent skins of animals and maps that other people create. Pls add all the things that I asked for and I will leave a 5 star review of this game. Also how do people think these are ads I've only had one and I've ben playing for 30 mins now there's no ads but pls don't add any more ok gg 👌

this game is actually really good,and like really amazing,you also get THOUSANDS of coins in just one run,even the ads on this game don't lie,those bouncemaster ads tell the actual gameplay,but there is one problem,it's the man in the ice,wben i crash into the ice,he catches me,like please remove him,he makes my scores seroously lower,to the point of even getting 1 to 2 thousand score with the highest stats,it actually makes me want to delete this game

Game is actually pretty fun. Although, the amount of ads is kind of excessive. I opted to spend the few dollars to remove ALL ads and there are still ads for everything except between runs. Either there is a bug or it's false advertising of the ALL ads part.

Overall its a good game. Regardless of purchasing no ads, there's far too many at every corner of this game. You manage to get a chest while flying, need to watch an ad to open it. Finished a flight, watch an ad. Want to upgrade this part, well you can't do that one without an ad. I'd also beware of using the dance emotes. Fortnite might have done this but they're paying for it now with suing from their inventors. A good game with potential, ruined by ads.
it's ok. but I've run into a glitch( for lack of a better word) twice. twice I've hit the penguin perfectly and he did re-enter the lower board, but then never landed again until I touched my screen.
solid game play, however the forced ads is what killed it for me. I'm good with the optional ads to double coins or get gems, but when I'm forced to watch an ad just to go again, I'm out.
way too many adds i can't explain my hate for these adds, but the over all game is amazing. .P.S My rating would 5 stars if there weren't any adds...

Really great and very addictive. Until you reach 100 on all of the stats. Have loads of coins now with nothing to use them on. Also, before I maxed out all my stats I was hitting the penguins the same distance, I bet this would change if I subscribed eh 😉 Perhaps you could add an option where you can buy different penguins etc And £6 + A WEEK!!! To subscribe, seems very very very very expensive. I mean what could you possibly get for your menu

It's getting annoying now Like actually annoying whenever I play the game and I lose it tells me to get my earnings and if I click any of them I get an instant ad. It doesn't even say "do you want to watch an add for this" no it doesn't and in order to remove adds it costs $6 to remove it!!! I won't really recommend this app unless you have extreme patience. I have patience but it's gone to far now.

Game was decent up until it started forcing an Ad on you after EVERY time you play. Stupid part is they give you an option to either double your coins for an Ad, or to not double it AND IT STILL GIVES YOU AN AD. What's the flippin point if youre just going to give a damn Ad anyways. Redundantly stupid. Ads suck anyways. Its always a red flag if a game is scamming you by selling essentially an Ad blocked for their game. Learn to make money.

Game is fun to play. Graphics are well done. Downfall of this game is the excessive amount of adds. After every run ends, you have to watch an add, even if you chose the normal amount of round gold. I get it for the x2, but even for the normal? Come on now. You watch more ads than actually play the game.

This game should be renamed "Admasters" lol. Ads after every single play and in between plays as well. Want more coins? Watch a video. Didn't want the extra coins? Here's a video anyway! Did good or bad? Here's a video. Want a free treasure chest or upgrade? Watch another video!!!! Don't want ads, pay up $$$ Fun game and funny characters ruined by horribly intrusive ads.

Overall its an okay game and can pass time but now, for me anyway, it's glitching. There's no obstacles to bounce off of making it impossible to reach what I have reached (1,000,000 and counting) so I would say its kind of broken my game and it is now impossible to die. But I'm not complaining about a super high score. Its the ads around every corner you should be complaining about. There's so many ads that I bet playgendary are swimming in dosh at the moment.

star_4.text: The game itself, very fun. Only problem for me; If I actually earn a chest, I should be able to open it without watching an ad. Literally anytime I get one, I have to constantly watch ads just to open it. It is so annoying.
fun game but lots of ads! while that is bad it's still lots of fun!

I love this game however I do have two complaints. Firstly, there are far too many ads in this game; after every little thing you do, you get an ad. I get that if you upgrade your membership, they are probably reduced but come on, there's literally an advert every few seconds outside of actual gameplay. My second complaint is a glitch; sometimes when I launch Penguin really far and especially if he's going super fast, he disappears off screen and it's just the scenery going by as if he's still there. It's not really game breaking but it's annoying that I have to go back to the main menu and lose an exceptionally high score. I'll continue to play, but please do something about these issues.

This game is fun for a bit, the goal is to send a tiny penguin to his girlfriend using multiple bats and upgrading your power, the game has a nice artstyle but it feels stale. There isn't much to do other than hop on, hit the penguin and wait for more offline income, when you beat the game, there is nothing left, you can continue to fly further on a global leaderboard, but other than that there is not much left to do and that is why I'm, giving it a 4/5. Fun for a bit, you might get bored.
The game personality is great overall. Once you have played it more than 2-3 times, it will get boring, but a real-time killer for long plane flights 👍
Im glad the bugs are fixed but I wish there were more levels and stuff to do. And I wish there was more to do with coins when you buy all the updates.

this game is good, really, I like the style of it, the idea behind it, but one thing that bothers me is it has no "low-graphics mode"... I've played the first few games just fine but now when I attempt to lauch the penguin it just freezes and I have to restart it. I really wish you'd add a "low-graphics mode" for older or slower phones because the game seems really fun, but I just can't play it :'(

A highly addictive game. Hilarious and entertaining characters. Upgrades are too easy to get at some point but bats are harder to collect, which is a good thing. There's a glitch in the game wherein at a certain speed & distance the penguin just keeps going and doesnt stop. I dont even see the penguin anymore! You can tell because everyone in the Global Leagues has the same distance. Maybe you ought to check it out. Does that mean penguin's finally reunited with his sweetheart? I wish there was a short video clip of that.

The game is really fun! Also if you guys hate the constant ads that pop up randomly, just turn off your wifi/data and there you go no ads should pop up. But I have 2 problems one it is quite hard to get a perfect hit(if that's the point of the game then nvm) and the bats are really expensive so can you make the bats also purchasable with coins? Thanks but other that great game.
It's a good game, I like it so much fun. One thing I don't like is that you have to hurt the cute little penguin so I give 4 stars.

Boucemasters is a good game but it doesn't last very long. I downloaded it about 3 or 4 days ago and I'm basically to the girl penguin. It's fun and easy to play but it's also full of ads. After every other session theres a add. So you should hit double coins after the round so at least you get somthing out of it. I think I would enjoy it more if there were less ads and after you reach the girl penguin you should have to do it again but its harder. That's why bouncemasters is 4 stars.

It verrrrrrrry veeerrrrrrrrry interesting game everytime we need to go far and far we can a ample amount of money very easily l had got more than 120000 and I upgraded it than also the money was this much only . I would have given it 5 stars if it would further had more levels or online multiplayer race please update and bring race and more levels and then would rate it 5 stars. I will wait for it.

I liked this game, but i had to delete it, it wouldn't stop lagging. I deleted it and got it again, and it still lagged l. I checked and it wasn't my phone that was making it lag, it was the game! Other than that it was a great game! Btw, if u were Complaining about ads (please dont get angry with me and think im a know-it-all, because i have had that before) ads help keep games free!😃😇☺

Bouncemasters is a really fun game! It runs smooth, I recommend it for almost anyone, Bouncemasters is pretty fun. You just hit a penguin with a club/stick and you have to go as far as possible. And yes you can purchase clubs for in-game money. 💸 Edit: It's fun but you get bored of it really quickly, because all your doing is just hitting a penguin. That's why I put 4 stars.

Honest review, the game is so fun, the graphic is good, doesn't have spent money because already got the ingame money and diamond easily, but the problem is the force ads everytime we finish the game when choosing between double the money or not, it will still give you ads anyway. So can you please remove the ads when we don't want to double the money, its quite annoying. Would give it a 5 if the ads will be remove for the not double coin gain.

it is a really fun game but when you get so far and you go to hit your penguin it doesn't ever stop and I will have to close the game just to be able to try and play again well it's getting more and more frequent and I really don't even want to play the game anymore it's really fun but if I can't even play it without the squid happening every other time then what's the point I'm kind of disappointed because like I said it is really fun there's all kinds of stuff you can unlock its cute but.......

This is a generally good game there are some rough patches where it just feels hard to progress in the game but it's not bad. Sometimes it just will not let you log onto the game and you have to try 2 or 3 or 4 times but eventually it let's you in. Just a tip if you decide to download, play on airplane mode if yoy can removes all of the annoying adds after every single round!

The game is fun, there is no doubt. There are two minor problems that I see. 1)Aggressive ads spamming. You'll be seeing ads constantly, but it might be tolerable. The gold given to upgrade per run is reasonable and you get passive gold when not playing, so you'd be making constant progress. 2) Misleading ad. I downloaded this cuz I saw "draw your bat" in its ad and gave me an impression that I'd be able to make the bear hit the penguin with a dick shape bat I draw. No drawing exist in the game

This is my favourite game. I completed it once before and recently started playing it again. However all of a sudden I'm having technical problems. The game starts up fine but once I've tapped the screen to make the penguin drop, I tap it again to take a swing but the app freezes and closes. Also, anytime I try to double my coins by watching an ad, it just shows the "No video available" message. Please fix this.

Misleading ad for this game. The ad made you think you get to draw the bat the polar bear uses. The game itself is pretty good, after a while of playing it becomes too much to look at and starts to hurt your eyes. Definitely too many ads as well, theres an ad everytime you fail wheter you click for extra coins or not, which can be really annoying.

star_5.text: This game is a lot of fun! You get to just click away and see how far you can make it! However, I will never install this game again, $4.99 for ad free is ridiculous! Not only is the price of ad free insanely high, the ads themselves are outrageously annoying. After (almost) every turn (1 turn could last 10 seconds up to 1 minute), there is an ad. These ad companies are making it impossible to back out of, too. Unless you have a soft key on your phone. fun game, ad free should he $0.99 tops. T.Y.

just started playing, trying to get this batting and bouncing down.wasnt hard to learn which I love and the fact that I had the choice from very beginning to get rid of ads is great! so far I like, time will tell
Test your accuracy in this game because all you have to do is get further distance but more distance you go, the harder to beat your high score is.

honestly this is a good fun game to play and pass time and i also think u can play it offline shich really improves trj accessibility to this game which makes it overallm fun and enjoyable playing when dhooting that penguin along the map. the weapons down to the journey and progress its all fun and makes a good little fun game
Works without wifi? Still it is very good game! 5 star rating

The game is absolutely amazing! Without the ads it would be better, but still 10/10! And I suggest adding more locations and things to do. Thank you fot making the game so great. I totaly recommend it!
this is a game where if you like progress and achievements this is it! this game is super fun and eye catching.
super fun, cant get enough, great game guys.
I just down loaded the game not that meny ads I'm also really really good
it's super fun and you can play offline like I always play on the plane but when you are online you can get some ads for no reason it's only the ads everything else is GREAT!

play this game on The daily it is super fun and you do not want to miss out on it. if you ever download this game just a reminder you are going to love it so so much that you're going to be playing 24/7 until the day you die and you'll probably be playing it while you're dead there's a theory that is game makes life longer in way longer and your friends life longer and your parents life as well so download it right now.

fun good time and easy play way to many apps though you watch more adds then game play time on every level and all games it takes up our the users time and its not ethical to me rebranding and more aquired players to me is by not doing what all these companies do its greed and alot of people are just sick of it its not gaming anymore......

it's fun free and doesn't need internet it's perfect for long rides and in my opinion it's a beautiful relaxing game to let your anger on bc when you miss the hit you need to whack the more you whack the less angry u are . most importantly it's FUN

My childhood game for sure the best.. the animations the unipq stuff and quite funny but the only. Downside it needs more stuff it gets kinda boring when u play alot same stuff but 9.5/10 can't say 10/10😂
Everything is great about the game but it gets better bc u can also play the game offline❤️🔥❤️🔥❤️

I see a lot of people struggling with ads, if you want no ads turn airplane mode on, makes it so there's no ad in sight. I love this game, the gameplay and graphics and good the way you can upgrade velocity speed and strength is super cool, I also love the intro of the game, good job, Playgendary.
really good game there's barely any ads and I just kinda wish you got to draw your own bat like in the ad for the game but any way awesome game
